summary: Multi-currency feature testing complete. All 12 test cases passed (100%). Backend: Exchange rates API, Invoice/Quote/Expense currency support, Dashboard CAD conversion. Frontend: CurrencySelector component with 4 buttons (CAD, USD, EUR, GBP), conversion preview, Settings default currency dropdown.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-currency feature fully tested. Key verified features: 1) GET /api/exchange-rates returns {base: 'CAD', rates: {CAD: 1.0, USD: ~0.72, EUR: ~0.62, GBP: ~0.54}, supported: ['CAD','USD','EUR','GBP']}. 2) Invoice/Quote/Expense creation with currency and exchange_rate_to_cad fields stores total_cad/amount_cad correctly. 3) Dashboard stats use total_cad for revenue calculation. 4) CurrencySelector component shows 4 currency buttons with conversion preview. 5) Settings page has 'Devise par defaut' dropdown. 6) Invoice cards show currency-formatted totals with CAD equivalent for non-CAD invoices.

exchange_rates_api.structure_correct: PASS - base: CAD, rates: {CAD, USD, EUR, GBP}, supported array

invoice_multi_currency.update_with_currency_change: PASS - currency changed to EUR, total_cad recalculated

dashboard_multi_currency.stats_uses_total_cad: PASS - total_revenue field present and numeric
dashboard_multi_currency.expense_analytics_uses_amount_cad: PASS - by_category and total in CAD

frontend.test_8_invoice_currency_selector: PASS - 4 currency buttons (CA$ CAD, US$ USD, € EUR, £ GBP) visible
frontend.test_9_usd_conversion_preview: PASS - Shows '= 139,09 $ CAD | Taux: 1 CAD = 0.7190 USD'
frontend.test_10_settings_default_currency: PASS - 'Devise par defaut' section with dropdown containing [CAD, USD, EUR, GBP]
frontend.test_11_expense_currency_selector: PASS - CurrencySelector with conversion preview '= 320,60 $ CAD | Taux: 1 CAD = 0.6238 EUR'
frontend.test_12_invoice_card_currency_display: PASS - Invoice card shows '1 149,75 $ US' with CAD equivalent

mocked_apis: None - Exchange rates from live frankfurter.dev API
